welcome.title: Mahubiri — Sermons & Preaching
welcome.heroDescription: Discover, listen and share thousands of sermons from your smartphone. Connect with preachers from around the world.
welcome.featuresSubtitle: A complete experience to access the teachings that matter
welcome.featureListenDesc: Stream or download sermons from a rich and varied library.
welcome.featureFavDesc: Organize your favorite sermons into personalized playlists for easy access.
welcome.featureProfileDesc: Follow your favorite preachers and receive their new sermons first.
welcome.featureNotifDesc: Get notified as soon as a new sermon is published by preachers you follow.
welcome.featureSearchDesc: Filter by theme, preacher, church or date to find the perfect sermon.
welcome.featureLangDesc: French, English, Swahili — and more languages coming very soon.
welcome.previewSubtitle: A clean and intuitive interface designed for you
welcome.ctaDescription: Sign in to your management area to publish sermons and manage your church.
welcome.contactSubtitle: A question or suggestion? Write to us.
welcome.footerBeta: Application in testing phase — Some features may evolve.
